org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.event

Class PointerEventAndroid

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.util.EventObject
      • org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.event.PointerEventAndroid
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, InputEvent, PointerEvent

    public class PointerEventAndroid
extends EventObject
implements PointerEvent
    Android implementation of a pointer event.

    $FullVersion$
    Author:
    $Author: galland$
